events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the pad-not-level condition fails inspection — it exceeds typical manufacturer tolerance (~2° out-of-level) needed for proper compressor oil return, risking oil starvation and premature compressor wear/warranty voidance. Decision is `fail` (medium risk), with corrective action to reset/shim the pad and verify level before energizing the unit.
